name: Resonance chain
short_description: You are in a dark, repetitive hallway without light. This is a walking simulator where you navigate through the darkness using echolocation.
detailed_description:
You are in a dark, repetitive hallway without light.

This is a walking simulator where you navigate through the darkness using echolocation.

"Resonance chain" is a P.T.-like short walking simulator.

We focused on creating a sense of quiet horror.

Play Time

20-30 minutes

Streaming Guidelines


Streaming/Let's Plays are allowed without permission for both individuals and companies.
Monetization is allowed.
It would be appreciated if you could include the game's name in the video/stream title, and include a link to the Steam page in the description.
We take no responsibility for any damages caused by streaming videos of this game.

The contents of these guidelines are subject to change without notice.
